settings.heading: Build it. Learn it. Make it yours.
settings.text: One compact kit turns an Arduino UNO into games, tools and tiny inventions, with every part and tutorial ready to go.

settings.heading: Everything included
settings.text: Open the box and start building

settings.heading: A complete core setup
settings.text: Arduino UNO, mini breadboard, OLED, controls and the parts your builds need.

settings.heading: Projects that feel like products
settings.text: Build tiny games, useful tools and interactive gadgets you can actually show off.

settings.heading: Guides made for first-timers
settings.text: Follow clear wiring and upload steps, then start changing the code yourself.

settings.heading: Less hunting for parts. More making things.
settings.text: BREADBOX is designed around one repeatable setup, so every new project feels exciting instead of overwhelming.

settings.title: Flappy Bird
settings.text: Build a pocket-sized arcade game with real buttons.

settings.title: Tiny Tetris
settings.text: Stack blocks on a crisp vertical OLED display.

settings.title: Doom Raycaster
settings.text: Learn how 3D-style worlds can run on tiny hardware.

settings.title: Mini PC
settings.text: Turn your kit into a calculator, timer and pocket utility.

settings.title: Oscilloscope
settings.text: Visualise signals and explore what circuits are doing.

settings.title: Gyro Racer
settings.text: Steer a racing game by moving the controller itself.

settings.heading: A box full of tiny adventures
settings.text: Every project uses the same compact BREADBOX setup, so you spend less time rebuilding and more time experimenting.

settings.heading: Choose your BREADBOX
settings.text: The core kit is ready to build. Add-ons let you take the next project further.

settings.quote: It felt like opening a game console, except we got to understand how every piece worked.
settings.name: Jamie R.

settings.quote: The compact setup is brilliant. My son can finish a project without losing half the parts across the desk.
settings.name: Priya M.

settings.quote: I bought it for the games and ended up learning enough to start making my own little tools.
settings.name: Alex T.

settings.heading: The kind of screen time that builds something

settings.question: Do I need any coding experience?
settings.answer: No. The projects include ready-to-upload code and step-by-step guidance. You can build first, then explore how the code works when you are ready.

settings.question: What computer do I need?
settings.answer: A laptop or desktop with a USB port and a modern Chromium-based browser is the simplest setup for the BREADBOX web uploader.

settings.question: Can I reuse the parts?
settings.answer: Yes. Reuse the same Arduino UNO, OLED, mini breadboard and controls across the included builds, then use them for your own projects.

settings.question: Is this suitable as a gift?
settings.answer: Absolutely. It is designed to feel exciting straight out of the box while still teaching real electronics and programming skills.

settings.heading: Before your first build
settings.text: Still wondering whether BREADBOX is the right first step? Here are the answers builders usually need.
